title: The Men in Black
author: UFO Folklore
content: The theory claims mysterious figures in suits harass and intimidate witnesses of UFO sightings to suppress information.
action: Powerful groups often use intimidation to maintain strict secrecy.

title: Project Blue Beam
author: Serge Monast
content: The theory proposes that global elites plan to use advanced holographic technology to stage a fake alien invasion.
action: Control of public perception is the ultimate tactical advantage.

title: The Titanic Insurance Fraud
author: Robin Gardiner
content: The theory suggests the Titanic was swapped with its sister ship, the Olympic, to commit a massive insurance fraud.
action: Financial distress creates extreme incentives for calculated destruction.

title: Subliminal Advertising
author: James Vicary
content: The theory posits that media intentionally inserts hidden messages into content to manipulate consumer behavior subconsciously.
action: Psychological manipulation is a proven tool for mass persuasion.

title: The 27 Club
author: Pop Culture
content: The theory suggests that an unusually high number of influential musicians died at age 27, implying a sinister connection.
action: Patterns often emerge simply because we are wired to find them.
